description: http4s-core_3 provides the core Scala 3 HTTP model and abstractions for building functional HTTP clients and servers, including requests, responses, headers, routes, entities, and related syntax. It is the foundation used by http4s client and server modules while integrating with Cats Effect and FS2 for effectful and streaming HTTP programs.

http4s-core provides the core data types, codecs, syntax, and HTTP message abstractions used by the http4s Scala HTTP stack. It supports building functional HTTP clients, servers, routes, headers, URIs, entity encoders and decoders, multipart handling, and WebSocket primitives.
